mapper.sql: select task_id, task_name, company_id, company_name, plan_start_time, plan_end_time, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, task_status, total_items, completed_items, normal_items, fault_items, no_device_items, executor_id, executor_name, task_type, period_type, period_year, period_num, manager_id, manager_name, manager_phone, operator_ids, operator_names, building_id, building_name, selected_system_ids, selected_fire_test_ids, maintenance_summary, maintenance_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fire_maintenance_task
mapper.select:
select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.company_id, t.company_name, t.plan_start_time, t.plan_end_time, t.actual_start_time, t.actual_end_time, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3) > 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3 AND r.check_result != '0') = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3) THEN '2' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3 AND r.check_result != '0') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE t.task_status END as task_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3) as total_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3 AND r.check_result != '0') as completed_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3 AND r.check_result = '1') as normal_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3 AND r.check_result = '2') as fault_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fire_maintenance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.level = 3 AND r.check_result = '3') as no_device_items, t.executor_id, t.executor_name, t.task_type, t.period_type, t.period_year, t.period_num, t.manager_id, t.manager_name, t.manager_phone, t.operator_ids, t.operator_names, t.building_id, t.building_name, t.selected_system_ids, t.selected_fire_test_ids, t.maintenance_summary, t.maintenance_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from fire_maintenance_task t
and t.task_name like concat('%', #{taskName}, '%') and t.company_id = #{companyId} and t.company_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%') and t.task_status = #{taskStatus} and t.executor_id = #{executorId} and t.executor_name like concat('%', #{executorName}, '%') and t.task_type = #{taskType} and t.period_type = #{periodType} and t.period_year = #{periodYear}
and date_format(t.plan_start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(t.plan_start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and ( t.manager_id = #{managerId} or t.executor_id = #{managerId} or FIND_IN_SET(#{managerId}, t.operator_ids) > 0 )
and t.building_id = #{buildingId}
order by t.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into fire_maintenance_task
task_name, company_id, company_name, plan_start_time, plan_end_time, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, task_status, total_items, completed_items, normal_items, fault_items, no_device_items, executor_id, executor_name, task_type, period_type, period_year, period_num, manager_id, manager_name, manager_phone, operator_ids, operator_names, building_id, building_name, selected_system_ids, selected_fire_test_ids, maintenance_summary, maintenance_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{taskName}, #{companyId}, #{companyName}, #{planStartTime}, #{planEndTime}, #{actualStartTime}, #{actualEndTime}, #{taskStatus}, #{totalItems}, #{completedItems}, #{normalItems}, #{faultItems}, #{noDeviceItems}, #{executorId}, #{executorName}, #{taskType}, #{periodType}, #{periodYear}, #{periodNum}, #{managerId}, #{managerName}, #{managerPhone}, #{operatorIds}, #{operatorNames}, #{buildingId}, #{buildingName}, #{selectedSystemIds}, #{selectedFireTestIds}, #{maintenanceSummary}, #{maintenanceTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update:
update fire_maintenance_task
task_name = #{taskName}, company_id = #{companyId}, company_name = #{companyName}, plan_start_time = #{planStartTime}, plan_end_time = #{planEndTime}, actual_start_time = #{actualStartTime}, actual_end_time = #{actualEndTime}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, total_items = #{totalItems}, completed_items = #{completedItems}, normal_items = #{normalItems}, fault_items = #{faultItems}, no_device_items = #{noDeviceItems}, executor_id = #{executorId}, executor_name = #{executorName}, task_type = #{taskType}, manager_id = #{managerId}, manager_name = #{managerName}, manager_phone = #{managerPhone},
period_type = #{periodType}, period_year = #{periodYear,jdbcType=INTEGER}, period_num = #{periodNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, operator_ids = #{operatorIds}, operator_names = #{operatorNames}, building_id = #{buildingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, building_name = #{buildingName},
selected_system_ids = #{selectedSystemIds}, selected_fire_test_ids = #{selectedFireTestIds}, remark = #{remark},
period_type = #{periodType}, period_year = #{periodYear}, period_num = #{periodNum}, operator_ids = #{operatorIds}, operator_names = #{operatorNames}, building_id = #{buildingId}, building_name = #{buildingName},
selected_system_ids = #{selectedSystemIds}, selected_fire_test_ids = #{selectedFireTestIds}, remark = #{remark},
maintenance_summary = #{maintenanceSummary}, maintenance_time = #{maintenanceTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_time = sysdate(),
where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete:
delete from fire_maintenance_task where task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.select: select c.company_id, c.company_code, c.company_name, c.project_name, c.short_name, c.company_type, c.address, c.check_in_longitude, c.check_in_latitude, c.check_in_radius, c.check_in_address, c.contact_person, c.contact_phone, c.status from fire_company c where c.del_flag = '0' and c.status = '0' and c.company_id in ( select distinct t.company_id from fire_maintenance_task t where t.manager_id = #{userId} or t.executor_id = #{userId} or FIND_IN_SET(#{userId}, t.operator_ids) > 0 ) order by c.company_name
